features: Wedding Party Decoration: Just married banner is perfect for wedding reception and just married party decoration, making your party more atmospheric. You can decorate car, gift dessert table, living room, wall, fireplace, window, garden etc

Quality Materials: This wedding banner is made from high quality cardstock, strudy and reusable. Each letter and shape is cut specifically for your banner. Adds the perfect touch to your wedding reception, bridal table, or getaway car decorations

Easy to Assemble: Each card of just married sign has 2 pre-punched holes on the top, just string them together with coordinating ribbon. Smaller punch holes keep letters in one place. Just position as desired and letters will stay, even at an angle

Various Occasions: Our just married decorations can be placed on your car, mantels, banisters, doors, windows, dessert tables, or even use as a photo backdrop. The bride and groom can use this banner as a photo prop when taking wedding photos

What You Get: You will receive 11pcs paper letter cards that spell the phrase "JUST MARRIED", 1 heart card and 1 roll ribbon! Cute enough to stand alone, but would also look adorable paired up with ribbons & streamers or greenery & flowers
